content.problemStatement: In this example, we demonstrate how to use a step decrement loop with a while loop in C to simulate a rocket launch countdown. The user provides the starting time in seconds, and the program decrements the time by 5 seconds on each iteration until liftoff.

sampleTestCases.output:
T-minus 40 seconds
T-minus 35 seconds
T-minus 30 seconds
T-minus 25 seconds
T-minus 20 seconds
T-minus 15 seconds
T-minus 10 seconds
T-minus 5 seconds
T-minus 0 seconds
Liftoff!
